title: thelypodium integrifolium
intro: Thelypodium integrifolium, also known as the entire-leaved thelypodium, is a plant species in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is native to the western United States and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, due to its high content of antioxidants and flavonoids. Thelypodium integrifolium can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its health benefits.
